title: Ops Pulse
brief: Let product and operations leads inspect SaaS health, move between Overview, Incidents, and Services, and resolve an incident locally from its detail dialog.
audience: Product and operations leads checking the service at the start of the day.
scope: Client-side Overview, Incidents, and Services navigation over one Ops Pulse fixture
Period-dependent availability, latency, error-budget metrics, and request-volume chart
Incident detail Dialog with a client-only Resolve transition that updates the active count and affected service status
boundaries: Resolve changes are local to the current browser session and are not persisted
The chart is a static fixture visualization rather than telemetry
